zh.Londesborough, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾隆德斯波洛
zh.King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterr: 英國賀特福爾金也斯 明日香
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Bromflete於1389年之前出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Bromflete16歲，母親Margaret Porter19歲。他於1416年4月27日之前與Joan Holland在英國結婚。他去世於1469年1月16日在英國越可爾隆德斯波洛，埋葬在英國倫敦特福利亞斯。

zh-hans.Londesborough, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾隆德斯波洛
zh-hans.King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterr: 英国賀特福爾金也斯 明日香
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry de Bromflete于1389年之前出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Bromflete16岁，母亲Margaret Porter19岁。他于1416年4月27日之前与Joan Holland在英国结婚。他去世于1469年1月16日在英国越可爾隆德斯波洛，埋葬在英国倫敦特福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Bromflete was born before 1389, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Bromflete, was 16 and his mother, Margaret Porter, was 19. He married Joan Holland before 27 April 1416, in England. He died on 16 January 1469, in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Whitefriars, London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry de Bromflete est né avant 1389, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Bromflete, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Margaret Porter, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Holland avant 27 avril 1416, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1469, à Londesborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Whitefriars, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry de Bromflete vor 1389 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Bromflete 16 und seine Mutter Margaret Porter 19. Er hat vor 27. April 1416 in England Joan Holland geheiratet. Er starb am 16. Januar 1469 in Londesborough, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Whitefriars, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Bromflete è nato il prima del 1389 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Bromflete, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Porter, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan Holland prima del 27 aprile 1416, nel England. Morì il 16 gennaio 1469, nel Londesborough, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolto a Whitefriars, London, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Londesborough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアロンデスボロウ
ja.King's Langley, Hertfordshire, Angleterr: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアキング'ス ラングリー
ja.Whitefriars, London, England: イギリスロンドンウィテフリアルズ
ja.Wymington, Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイアウイミントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Bromfleteが1389年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Bromfleteは16歳，母Margaret Porterは19歳であった。1416年4月27日以前にイギリスでJoan Hollandと結婚した。彼は1469年1月16日にイギリスヨークシュアイアロンデスボロウで死去し，イギリスロンドンウィテフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Bromflete(이)가 1389년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Bromflete(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Porter(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1416년 4월 27일 이전 영국에서 Joan Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1469년 1월 16일 영국 요르크실르 론데스버루그h에서 사망했으며 영국 런던 휘테프리아르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Bromflete nasceu antes 1389, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Bromflete, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Porter, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Holland antes 27 de abril de 1416, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1469, em Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Whitefriars, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry de Bromflete родился перед 1389 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Bromflete было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Porter, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Holland перед 27 апрель 1416 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 16 января 1469 г. в местности лондесбороую, еркшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности уитефрярс, Лондон, Англия.

sm.1389 - 1390: mai le 1389 e o'o I le 1390

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry de Bromflete nació antes de 1389, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Bromflete, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Margaret Porter, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan Holland antes de 27 de abril de 1416, en Inglaterra. Murió el 16 de enero de 1469, en Londesborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Whitefriars, London, Inglaterra.
